news.t: Pacer ETFs Introduces New Way to Access World's Most Innovative Companies with Launch of the Pacer Nasdaq International Patent Leaders ETF

holdings.infoBox: PATN is an equity ETF with a total of 108 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 11.60%, Samsung Electronics at 9.13%, SK hynix at 8.11%, ASML Holding at 5.04%, and Tencent Holdings at 3.42%.

overview.description: The Pacer Nasdaq International Patent Leaders ETF (PATN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq International Patent Leaders index. The fund seeks to track an index of the top 100 international large- and midcap growth companies, as measured by patent valuations. Holdings are weighted by market capitalization. PATN was launched on Sep 16, 2024 and is issued by Pacer.

data.title: Pacer ETFs Introduces New Way to Access World's Most Innovative Companies with Launch of the Pacer Nasdaq International Patent Leaders ETF
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $PATN #ETF--Pacer ETFs debuts Pacer Nasdaq International Patent Leaders ETF, aims to give investors exposure to top, innovative companies on a global scale.
